title: mentha australis
intro: Mentha australis, also known as the Australian peppermint or native peppermint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Mentha australis include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which helps to soothe digestive issues and relieve headaches. The health benefits of Mentha australis include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce nausea and vomiting, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. Mentha australis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health issues and provide a calming effect.
